name: Farming Mini Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farming Mini Puzzle Game, a fun and relaxing farming adventure packed with exciting puzzle challenges, colorful farm environments, and rewarding gameplay. If you enjoy puzzle games, farming games, brain teasers, and casual challenges, this game offers the perfect combination of entertainment and mental exercise. Step into a charming countryside world where you can solve puzzles, complete farming tasks, and enjoy endless hours of fun while improving your problem-solving skills.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
